description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image and defines a single stage named build. Include a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory and makes ./gradlew executable. Add a build job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew assembleRelease and publishes the generated app-release-unsigned.apk located at app/build/outputs/apk/release/ as a job artifact. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, or conditional rules.
